title: Education
explanation:
Education

  • people: pupil, student, professor, lecturer
  • places: university, college, laboratory, lecture hall
  • words: degree, exam, coursework, graduate, fail, pass

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: She wants to get a ____ in medicine. | *degree | exam | pupil
The ____ starts at nine o'clock. | *lecture | graduate | fail
He ____ from university last year. | *graduated | passed | studied
All students must pass the final ____. | *exam | degree | lecturer

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: She is a ____ at Oxford. | student
We did the experiment in the ____. | laboratory
I hope I ____ the test. | pass

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: He failed the exam but he will ____ again. | *try | graduate | degree
A ____ is a child at school. | *pupil | professor | university
She goes to ____ to study engineering. | *college | pupil | fail
I have a lot of ____ to finish. | *coursework | lecture | graduate
